name: auto-docs
description: Skills for scaffolding and navigating the standard Automatic docs/ directory structure in any project.

skills.name: automatic-docs
skills.description: Scaffold the standard Automatic docs/ directory structure in a project. Creates all section directories and stub files with correct frontmatter. Use when asked to "set up docs", "scaffold documentation", "create the docs structure", or "add docs to this project".

skills.name: automatic-docs-find
skills.description: Find the right documentation file in a project using the standard Automatic docs/ structure. Use when asked where to find something, where to document something, which file covers a topic, or when about to read or write docs and need to know the correct location.
